base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_menus — a ui (menu_screen) from 1999 chrono cross. Menu + equipment + element grid + stat UI. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Menu + equipment + element grid + stat UI
